name: Garlic Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F and prepare the muffin pans.
2. In a bowl, mix together the first six ingredients until well combined.
3. Gradually add the remaining ingredients and blend until just mixed.
4. Spoon the batter into the prepared pans.
5. Bake for 15-20 minutes.
6. Makes 12 muffins. Note: Use these muffins in place of garlic bread. Lovely with soups, etc.
